title: Astracantha hilariae

intro: Astracantha hilariae, also known as Oxytropis hilariae, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae, commonly found in mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial for treating various health conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Astracantha hilariae include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its therapeutic properties. In traditional medicine, Astracantha hilariae is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, which are used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
